evals.prompt: /contentforge:cf-brief AI-powered customer service chatbots for e-commerce
evals.expected_output: A structured content brief with keyword analysis, competitor content gaps, audience targeting, outline recommendations, and an AEO/GEO strategy section

assertions.text: Brief includes primary and secondary keyword recommendations with search volume estimates, clearly labeled as estimates when no SEO connector is configured
Competitor content analysis identifies gaps, differentiation opportunities, and E-E-A-T signals (author credentials, original data, first-hand experience)
Target audience and search intent are clearly defined
Suggested outline includes H2/H3 hierarchy with word count targets per section

Brief includes an AEO/GEO section: AI Overview presence per target query, citation-worthiness checklist, and PAA questions mapped to answer blocks (question-style H2s answered in the first 40-60 words)
SEO strategy specifies keyword placements (title, H1, first 100 words, H2s) rather than density percentages; no density target is presented as a quality gate
The brief document is saved and its location is reported to the user (via the brand's tracking backend or a local path)

evals.prompt: Create a content brief for a thought leadership article about ESG investing trends in 2026
evals.expected_output: A research-backed brief with financial industry context, authoritative source recommendations, and E-E-A-T considerations

assertions.text: Brief recommends authoritative financial sources (not just generic blogs)
E-E-A-T signals are addressed: author expertise, citing studies, original data opportunities
Content angle differentiates from top-ranking competitor content
Quality score goal of 8.5+ appears in the success metrics
